//: Hardened settings used ONLY by run.sh's autonomous review session (passed via --settings). It processes untrusted pasted chess.com HTML with --permission-mode dontAsk, so anything NOT allowed here is auto-denied (no prompt, no hang). This file does NOT affect your normal interactive sessions in this repo — those follow your global ~/.claude config. The allow list is deliberately liberal enough that the chess-review pipeline (including its node -e verify step) never stalls; the deny list blocks the vectors that actually matter for injected content: network egress, reads outside the repo/tmp, and destructive deletes. Advisor is turned off via the CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_ADVISOR_TOOL=1 env var exported in run.sh (empty advisorModel does NOT disable it). Effort is set to medium by run.sh's --effort flag; the effortLevel key below is a harmless backup.
